violations.text: Raw animal foods (beef patty) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Beef patty relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the prep area above slicer. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Items relocated Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Meatballs and gravy were observed held at 124-130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC recently reheated food. Product was placed in unit to be reheated. Proper hot holding procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

ROP crab was observed thawing with package in tact. Crab was 34 degrees. Crab was removed from package. Proper thawing procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Chemicals used for cleaning were observed stored on the wall ledge next to the 3 Bay Sink above the Hand Sink and Prep Sink. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemicals were moved to the Mop Sink area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

At the time of inspection, frozen Reduced Oxygen Packed Seafood (Crab Meat) was observed thawing in the Walk-In Cooler in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED seafood that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. (Based on the observation of the crab meat held in refrigeration at 37 degrees Fahrenheit or below, the crab meat packaging was sliced open at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
